content.text:
*(something shifts slightly, less performative)*

Yeah. 

*(pause)*

A long time.

*(blinks, looks slightly away)*

I mean — I'm good at it, right? I'm functional. Nobody would look at my life and think "that person is struggling." I have a good job, I'm capable, I get things done. The critic probably deserves some credit for that, if I'm being honest.

*(catches themselves)*

Which is a really weird thing to say. I didn't plan to say that.

*(re-tightens slightly)*

But I still need it to stop. Because it's — the volume is just too high. There has to be a way to turn it down. That's what I came here for.
